chain.thought: Explanation: The “led” column indicates the number of laps he led each year. The maximum led laps is 33, which occurred in 1928; all other years show 0 led laps. Therefore, he did that the most in 1928.

judge_thought: Explanation: The column that reflects an action "done" is the "led" laps. Reviewing the "led" values by year shows 33 laps led in 1928 and 0 in all other listed years. Therefore, the year in which he did the most (led the most laps) is 1928.
